title: Shape Language
editorialSummary: Geometric shapes and forms grouped by category. False trail: Ellipse and Circle are both conic sections — both correctly belong in that group. Rhombus and Parallelogram are both quadrilaterals (a rhombus is a special parallelogram) but both belong in Types of Quadrilateral as the group is not 'unique' quadrilaterals. Torus is a 3D solid sometimes confused with a circle.
